title: Bear's fun stuff
description: It is a mod of random stuff like dragon ball z and stuff like that
body:
hi this has stuff... yeah so...

This is my **FIRST** mod

so dont expect anything crazy,

**Cell Update**
Added Cell and other forms. The Cell egg is crafted with 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

kamehameha and dragon ball i think

</details>

 **ROBLOX**
there is robloxite ore and sword and armor


**SKYLANDERS**
a structure called "Traptanium crystal." and wallops hammer crafted with the crystal block.


**DBZ**

Frieza fight and cell fight and kamehameha
And a new dimension called "Namek"
Dragon balls are included.


**FNAF/POPPYPLAYTIME**
bonnie guitar and catnap necklace.


i dont really know why i made this mode but, yea 

this adds poppy playtime, fnaf, dragon ball z, skylanders, roblox and more!

I dont know what to add next soo im prob gonna add more features for the games/shows listed above.

comment a suggestion on one of my vids on my [Youtube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@bearlake3dboy)
 

this is a work in progress so

it is not finished
i am prob gonna add newer versions and add msm (My Singing Monsters) to the mod or smt


 

also kamehameha is op...
